general.title: MOSuite - plot Volcano Enhanced
general.instructions: Create enhanced volcano plots from differential expression analysis results to visualize fold change and statistical significance

parameters.name: multiOmicDataSet file pattern
parameters.description: Regex pattern used to locate the multiOmicDataSet .rds file

parameters.name: Feature ID column name
parameters.description: Column name for feature IDs (gene names, etc). If not provided, uses first column

parameters.name: Significance column names
parameters.description: Column names of significance values (comma-separated). Example: B-A_adjpval,B-C_adjpval

parameters.name: Significance threshold
parameters.description: Significance cutoff for p-values (FDR, adjusted p-value, etc.)

parameters.name: Fold change column names
parameters.description: Column names of fold change values (comma-separated). Example: B-A_logFC,B-C_logFC

parameters.name: Fold change threshold
parameters.description: Fold change cutoff for significance (log scale)

parameters.name: Sort output by
parameters.description: How to sort output dataset: 'p-value' or 'fold-change'

parameters.name: Number of features to label
parameters.description: Number of top features/genes to label in the volcano plot

parameters.name: Use only additional labels
parameters.description: If TRUE, only the additional labels specified will be used, ignoring the top features

parameters.name: Additional feature labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated feature names or IDs to include in the volcano plot

parameters.name: Highlight significant points in red
parameters.description: If TRUE, highlights points meeting significance and fold change criteria in red

parameters.name: Label size
parameters.description: Size of the labels in the volcano plot

parameters.name: Significance axis label
parameters.description: Name for the significance column in the plot

parameters.name: Fold change axis label
parameters.description: Name for the fold change column in the plot

parameters.name: Plot title
parameters.description: Title of the plot

parameters.name: Use custom labels
parameters.description: If TRUE, uses custom labels for plot axes

parameters.name: Y-axis limit
parameters.description: Y-axis limits for the plot (0 = auto)

parameters.name: Custom X-axis limits
parameters.description: Custom X-axis limits (e.g., -5,5 or empty for auto)

parameters.name: X-axis limit padding
parameters.description: Additional space to add to the X-axis limits

parameters.name: Y-axis limit padding
parameters.description: Additional space to add to the Y-axis limits

parameters.name: Axis label size
parameters.description: Size of the axis labels

parameters.name: Point size
parameters.description: Size of the points in the plot

parameters.name: Image width (pixels)
parameters.description: Output image width in pixels

parameters.name: Image height (pixels)
parameters.description: Output image height in pixels

parameters.name: DPI
parameters.description: Dots per inch of the output image

parameters.name: Interactive plots
parameters.description: Whether to create interactive plotly plots

parameters.name: Plot filename
parameters.description: Plot output filename
